Teswiz
Home oss Teswiz

Teswiz

End-2-End framework for Native & Web Automation using Cucumber-jvm, Appium, Selenium WebDriver, Applitools & ReportPortal

teswiz — Implement automated tests for Android & iOS apps, Web, and Windows desktop apps using Cucumber-JVM.   🌐  

getting-started-with-teswiz — Easy way to start using teswiz.
